data.title: FLSmidth & Co. A/S: New Leadership, Supportive Markets and Margin Upside Underpin Reiterated Buy Rating and Higher DKK 610 Target
data.description:
David Farrell, an analyst from Jefferies, reiterated the Buy rating on FLSmidth & Co. A/S. The associated price target was raised to DKK610.00.

Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

David Farrell has given his Buy rating due to a combination of factors tied to FLSmidth & Co. A/S’s positioning and recent performance. He highlights that the company is entering 2026 with a new CEO, supportive end markets, and a clear growth agenda, creating an attractive backdrop for shareholders.

Farrell also notes that fourth-quarter performance was robust, even though management had tempered expectations around order momentum, which in his view reduces risk around the 2026 revenue targets ahead of a stronger recovery from 2027 onward. He further expects September’s capital markets day to bring upgraded EBITA margin ambitions that could sit above current market assumptions, justifying his reiterated Buy rating and higher DKK 610 price target.

In another report released on February 20, Goldman Sachs also maintained a Buy rating on the stock with a DKK575.00 price target.
data.author: TipRanks Auto-Generated Intelligence Newsdesk
